heading: Tonight
text: Scattered showers and storms diminishing. Partial clearing, then mixed clouds and some valley fog. Lows in the 50s to near 60. Wind diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Saturday
text: Morning fog burning off to partly sunny skies. Chance of a few localized afternoon showers and/or thunderstorms, mainly in the north and over the Greens. Highs in the 70s to low 80s. Light and variable wind.

heading: Saturday Night
text: A few localized evening showers ending overnight. Partly cloudy, with locally dense valley fog. Lows in the 50s to near 60. Light and variable wind.
